Source: Copilot Extensibility Docs
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/extensibility/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Microsoft 365 Copilot Extensibility Documentation

## Overview
Build custom Copilot experiences using Microsoft 365 extensibility options including agents, connectors, and Copilot APIs.

## Key Sections

### Get Started
- Overview of extensibility options
- Planning guide
- Licensing and cost considerations

### Create and Manage Agents
- Agents overview
- Build declarative agents
- Build custom engine agents
- Manage agents in M365 admin center

### Extend with Plugins and Connectors
- Add plugins to declarative agents
- Use Copilot connectors
- Build custom Copilot connectors

### Developer Tools and APIs
- Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit
- Microsoft 365 Agents SDK
- Microsoft 365 Copilot APIs
- Copilot Studio documentation
- Microsoft Agent 365 (early access preview)

Last updated: 2025-11-18
